name: OmopPatientObservationPeriodView
title: Patient → observation_period (FHIR-flat, stage 1)
description:
Observation period defines spans during which a person is observable. Not a direct field-level mapping from Patient — derived from event data availability. Most implementations either skip this table or emit a placeholder row at person-creation time.

Stage 1 of FHIR→OMOP: produce a flat row keeping source codes per vocabulary. Stage 2 joins vocab.concept to resolve concept_ids.

column.name: id
column.description: FHIR Patient.id; surrogate OMOP key derived (hash/sequence) downstream.

extension.valueString: surrogate key from hash/sequence/lookup of FHIR id

column.name: subject_id
column.description: Foreign key to person table, derived from Patient.id

extension.valueString: resolve PERSON reference; downstream maps to person_id
